generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes, driven by permanent magnet synchronous motor and cycloidal gear transmission"
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manufacturing environment for complex machining tasks"
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of robot axes for monitoring"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard for visualizing robot performance metrics"
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Joint friction identification for motion accuracy optimization"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of MABI MAX 100 robot state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard visualization for robot status"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance JointFrictionOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) with SysML for requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, VisualizationService
]

instance ACMEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component & connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component & connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component & connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RFLPEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics) methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionOptimizationService
]

instance OOSEMEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionOptimizationService
]

instance SPESEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionOptimizationService
]

instance SMArDTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionOptimizationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavior description"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionOptimizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionOptimizationService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation for detailed behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionOptimizationService
]

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java implementation for detailed behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionOptimizationService
]

instance RobotStateMeasurementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring physical state of MABI MAX 100 robot axes for path repeatability and positional accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance RobotPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RobotStateMeasurementSensor
    base:desc "Automated one-way data flow from physical to virtual systems using MQTT protocol"
]

instance RobotStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Physical system state measurements from MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance StructuralModel_SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML IBD structural model of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler

instance SimulationModel_Simulink : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time, continuous data synchronization via MQTT protocol for one-way data flow from physical assets to the digital shadow, enabling live state representation and operational improvements during system operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model defined as a UML class diagram, utilizing component & connector architecture via ADLs (SysML IBDs, MontiArc Automaton) for modeling system components, interfaces, and interconnections, with hierarchical abstraction levels managed through methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication protocol for network communication is MQTT. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, reliability mechanisms, redundancy configurations, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering, AADL for architecture description, ACME for component & connector modeling, and MontiArc for architecture descriptions, ensuring structured representation of system components, interfaces, and interconnections."
]
